text:
"As a bird"... The meaning is, that a curse uttered without cause shall do no harm to the person that is cursed, but will 
return upon him that curseth, as whithersoever a bird flies, it returns to its own nest.

"Answer not a fool"... That is, so as to 
imitate him but only so as to reprove his folly.
"The heap of Mercury."... The heap of stones at the foot of this idol.
